title: hydrangea aspera var. longipes
intro: Hydrangea aspera var. longipes, also known as the rough hydrangea or long-stalked hydrangea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Hydrangeaceae. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Hydrangea aspera var. longipes include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce swelling and protect against cell damage, as well as support the digestive system and relieve symptoms of fever and pain. In traditional herbal medicine, Hydrangea aspera var. longipes is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
